subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath opened the gate of Manifestation with the key of His Most Mighty, Most Holy, Most Glorious Name, and hath summoned all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح باب الظهور بمفتاح اسمه الاعز الاقدس الابهی و دعا الکل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
